game_name: Star Wars Jedi Knight: Mysteries of the Sith

sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Force Powers
special_mechanics.description: Jedi Force abilities accessible to player, some capable of causing damage to enemies while others used for non-violent activities

special_mechanics.name: Lightsaber Combat
special_mechanics.description: Melee weapon with emphasis on lightsaber combat mechanics; multiplayer includes lightsaber-only maps

special_mechanics.name: Third-Person View Option
special_mechanics.description: Player can switch between first-person and third-person perspective during gameplay

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/Qualitative only. Available source is Wikipedia article containing plot, gameplay overview, and development information. No quantitative physics parameters (movement speed, gravity, jump height, acceleration, etc.) are documented. This expansion uses the Sith engine from Dark Forces II with technical improvements (colored lighting, new models, better AI) but no specific movement physics details provided.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Star Wars Jedi Knight: Mysteries of the Sith
